notableEvents.label: Yoán Moncada plunked
notableEvents.detail: Yoán Moncada hit by pitch. Jeimer Candelario scores. Logan O'Hoppe to 3rd. Oswald Peraza to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza grounds into a double play, first baseman Matt Olson to second baseman Ozzie Albies to pitcher Osvaldo Bido. Logan O'Hoppe out at 2nd. Oswald Peraza out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Austin Riley GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Riley grounds into a double play, second baseman Adam Frazier to first baseman Jeimer Candelario. Matt Olson out at 2nd. Austin Riley out at 1st.
